## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this pull request focused.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I ran `composer validate --strict`.
- [ ] I ran `composer test`.
- [ ] I ran `composer format`.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, API keys, `.env` files, database dumps, or private data.
